message:
fix(e2e): Move network tests to correct directory and fix import paths

- Move network test files from e2e/network/ to e2e/web/network/
  so they are discovered by playwright config (testDir: ./web)
- Fix import paths from ../lib to ../../lib/playwright-logger
- Add .first() to heading selectors for consistency with basket tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
